entries.title: FICO hits 720 — crosses SBA threshold
entries.content: FICO updated to 720, up from 698. Crossed the SBA-preferred 720 threshold. USAA confirmed paid in full. Statement balance $13,125.95 due April 9. NNN broker outreach: Chris Schellin (Westwood) no response — following up with Jason Simon. Starbucks property off Chippewa, St. Louis — in active lease negotiations, planning 1031 exit in 2026. ABL outreach email drafted for GFS post-close revolving facility.

entries.title: Deal structure corrected + Mission Control upgraded
entries.content: Ownership structure corrected and locked: Viking 90 40% | JB 15% | Management 27% | Woody 18% = 100%. Removed 'guaranteed $14M' language — corrected to $12.3M in cash + contractual payments. Veritex confirmed acquired by Huntington National Bank Jan 2026 — Kirk Beason now at Huntington. Mission Control upgraded: all doc links converted from Google Drive to GitHub raw URLs, auto-deploys via Netlify. Woody meeting agenda built (45-min minute-by-minute playbook). R&D Team ran full Resolved pre-launch analysis.

entries.title: Live Oak SBA research complete + Mission Control goes live
entries.content: Researched Live Oak Bank SBA 7(a) acquisition criteria in depth. GFS passes every quantitative filter — DSCR 2.32x vs 1.5x requirement. FICO 698 and no fire industry experience are manageable soft risks. Chase card paid down to $418 (3% utilization). Mission Control connected to GitHub + Netlify — live dashboard active.

entries.title: Overnight research session — 4 major deliverables
entries.content: Ace completed overnight research: (1) NNN broker list — top 5 brokers in MO/TX/CO for Starbucks/QSR exits and 1031 exchanges. (2) Wyoming LLC structure recommendation — Clint Coons 2-LLC strategy for rental portfolio. (3) DFW independent security partners — 5 non-PE-backed companies for GFS referral network. (4) GFS Investor One-Pager — $400K raise, 8% preferred, 3-5yr hold. JB Personal Financial Statement built — 9 sections, SBA-formatted.

entries.title: First Session with Ace
entries.content: First session with Ace. Covered GFS acquisition in depth (read 9 deal docs + 3 years financials), built banker call prep, analyzed credit profile, designed Resolved funnel, built SafeGuard subscription program, mapped 10-year platform vision, identified 11 DFW acquisition targets, built Woody growth pitch, set up Notion dashboard, designed Mission Control.
